features.name: combinational_variable_as_array_index
features.description: Code should include a variable assigned in a combinational always block used as an array index in a sequential always block

features.name: bit_inversion_on_combinational_index
features.description: Code should include bitwise inversion operator applied to a combinational variable used as array index in sequential block

features.name: xor_computed_index_multiple_arrays
features.description: Code should include XOR operation computing an index used to access multiple arrays in a sequential block
